<!-- _includes/pages-nav.qmd
     Shared "pages nav" partial — a horizontal strip of links across the top
     of a multi-page vignette, with the current page highlighted. This is the
     Phase 0 pilot for splitting one long vignette into per-section pages
     (JohnGavin/llm#778). Currently hardcodes the 8 telemetry pages; a future
     phase may parameterise the link set via a Lua/shortcode filter so other
     multi-page vignettes can reuse it without copy-pasting the link list.
     Usage: {{< include ../../_includes/pages-nav.qmd >}} (adjust relative
     depth to match the including page's folder depth).
     See .claude/rules/dark-mode-completeness.md and .claude/rules/uniform-typography.md.
-->

```{=html}
<style>
.pages-nav {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.25rem 0.5rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;
  border-radius: 0.375rem;
  background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.3);
}

.pages-nav a {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.pages-nav a:focus {
  outline: 2px solid #4ea8de;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

/* Light mode */
body:not(.dark-mode) .pages-nav a {
  color: #333333;
}
body:not(.dark-mode) .pages-nav a:hover {
  background: rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.12);
}
body:not(.dark-mode) .pages-nav a.active {
  background: #0d6efd;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Dark mode — mirrors _includes/closeread-navigation.html conventions */
body.dark-mode .pages-nav {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}
body.dark-mode .pages-nav a {
  color: #e9ecef;
}
body.dark-mode .pages-nav a:hover {
  background: rgba(78, 168, 222, 0.18);
}
body.dark-mode .pages-nav a.active {
  background: #4ea8de;
  color: #000000;
  font-weight: 600;
}
</style>

<nav class="pages-nav" aria-label="Telemetry section pages">
  <a href="index.html" data-page="index">Overview</a>
  <a href="llm-usage-costs.html" data-page="llm-usage-costs">Usage &amp; Costs</a>
  <a href="session-efficiency.html" data-page="session-efficiency">Session Efficiency</a>
  <a href="pipeline-metrics.html" data-page="pipeline-metrics">Pipeline Metrics</a>
  <a href="github-activity.html" data-page="github-activity">GitHub Activity</a>
  <a href="project-structure.html" data-page="project-structure">Project Structure</a>
  <a href="prediction-calibration.html" data-page="prediction-calibration">Prediction Calibration</a>
  <a href="methodology.html" data-page="methodology">Methodology</a>
</nav>

<script>
(function () {
  'use strict';
  var path = window.location.pathname;
  var page = 'index';
  var m = path.match(/\/([^\/]+)\.html?$/i);
  if (m && m[1]) {
    page = m[1].toLowerCase();
  } else if (/\/telemetry\/?$/.test(path) || /\/$/.test(path)) {
    page = 'index';
  }
  var links = document.querySelectorAll('.pages-nav a[data-page]');
  for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
    if (links[i].getAttribute('data-page') === page) {
      links[i].classList.add('active');
      links[i].setAttribute('aria-current', 'page');
    }
  }
})();
</script>
```
